name: Ham Stir-Fry Over Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. WASH the sweet potatoes.
2. PIERCE them with a fork several times.
3. BAKE at 350°F for about one hour or until tender.
4. HEAT oil in a skillet.
5. SAUTÉ onions, garlic, ginger, and green pepper until tender.
6. ADD honey, pineapple chunks, chicken broth, and Chinese five spices to the pan. SIMMER for five minutes.
7. BLEND cornstarch and water together until smooth. STIR into the broth.
8. HEAT until boiling, then STIR until thickened.
9. STIR in ham slices and toasted almonds.
10. SEASON with salt and pepper to taste.
11. HEAT through.
12. PLACE hot sweet potatoes on a platter or individual plates.
13. CUT through the skin and COARSELY MASH with a fork.
14. SPOON ham onto the potatoes.
15. SERVE immediately.
